inputs.label: Sensor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of IoT sensor hardware including installation. Based on industry benchmarks from ARC Advisory Group.

inputs.label: Number of Sensors
inputs.businessContext: Total sensors deployed for predictive maintenance. Typical range per facility.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (Traditional)
inputs.businessContext: Total annual maintenance cost before IoT implementation. Includes labor, parts, downtime. Source: ISO 14224.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost Reduction (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected reduction in maintenance costs due to predictive maintenance. Typical 15-30% based on McKinsey studies.

inputs.label: Annual Downtime Hours (Traditional)
inputs.businessContext: Total unplanned downtime hours per year before IoT. Industry average from Reliable Plant.

inputs.label: Downtime Reduction (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected reduction in downtime due to predictive maintenance. Typical 20-50%.

inputs.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost revenue or cost per hour of downtime. Varies by industry; manufacturing average ~$5k.

inputs.label: Sensor Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of IoT sensors. Typically 3-7 years.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for NPV calculation. Typical 8-12%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low=0.8, Medium=0.9, High=1.0 adjustment factor.

thresholds.maintenanceCostReductionPercent > 40: High reduction may require significant process changes
thresholds.discountRate > 15: High discount rate may undervalue long-term benefits

hiddenLossDrivers: if (maintenanceCostReductionPercent > 40) 'High maintenance reduction target may require process changes'
if (downtimeReductionPercent > 60) 'Aggressive downtime reduction target; verify feasibility'
if (discountRate > 15) 'High discount rate may undervalue long-term benefits'
suggestedActions: if (netPresentValue < 0) 'Consider reducing sensor cost or increasing savings targets'
if (paybackPeriodYears > sensorLifespanYears) 'Investment may not be recovered within sensor lifespan; reassess'
if (returnOnInvestment < 0) 'Project is not financially viable; explore alternative solutions'
